nasb.text: All mankind is stupid, devoid of knowledge; Every goldsmith is put to shame by his idols, For his molten images are deceitful, And there is no breath in them.

esv.text: Every man is stupid and without knowledge; every goldsmith is put to shame by his idols, for his images are false, and there is no breath in them.

cnv.text: 人人都是頑梗無知； 所有的金匠都因偶像羞愧， 因為他們鑄造的像都是虛假，沒有氣息。

ccb.text: 世人都愚昧无知， 工匠都因所制的偶像而羞愧， 因为神像没有生命气息， 是虚假的，
